body_txt: A fairly common staple of Western Animation, this trope involves a character being so enamoured with another, their whole body turns into a puddle of goo . Can be used as the female equivalent of Something Else Also Rises (and often is, as seen in a lot of 1990s Warner Bros. Animation cartoons, like Animaniacs and Tiny Toon Adventures ). Male characters can experience this too, but likely used as a Censor Decoy if the censors don't want implications of erections to be shown, or if the writer wants to move past metaphorically showing an erection or ejaculation and go straight to metaphorically showing an orgasm/post-coital come-down. Or perhaps a male character is In Touch with His Feminine Side . A Sub-Trope of I'm Melting! , Harmless Liquefaction . Compare Fiery Sensuality for the idea that love and passion are so hot that they can metaphorically heat someone beyond their melting point. Also compare Perverted Drooling for a different liquid. Contrast Shameful Shrinking .
